entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume crop Cajanus cajan studied for pod borer infestation

entities.name: SOWING TIME
entities.description: The timing of planting the crop, varied between early May, mid-May, and mid-June

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: The pest Helicoverpa armigera that causes damage to pigeonpea pods

entities.name: POD BORER INFESTATION
entities.description: The occurrence and extent of damage caused by Helicoverpa armigera on the crop

entities.name: SONIPAT DISTRICT, HARYANA
entities.description: The geographical area where the field trials were conducted

entities.name: ON-FARM FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: The experimental approach used to test sowing dates and record infestation and yield

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: EARLY SOWING
entities.description: Planting the crop in the first week of May
